keyPoints: Context-Free Grammar: a set of production rules that define the structure of a language
Constituency: the relationship between words within a sentence to form phrases and clauses
Top-down Parsing: a method of parsing where we start with the overall structure and break it down into smaller parts
Bottom-up Parsing: a method of parsing where we start with individual words and build up the overall structure
CYK Parsing: a dynamic programming algorithm for parsing Context-Free Grammars
